//: Polis hook mapping for Cursor (schema version 1). Cursor's lifecycle events differ from Claude Code: there is no PostToolUse and no SessionStart. The closest equivalents Polis uses are: beforeSubmitPrompt (bootstrap + inject context on each prompt), afterFileEdit (track changes for the context estimate), and stop (flush the estimate / offer pause). $CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT is exported by install.sh so the scripts can resolve their own location. Cursor runs command hooks that read JSON on stdin and may return JSON on stdout.
